metadata.creator: City of Franklin TN
metadata.description:
City of Franklin, BOMA Work Session 2-22-2022

WORK SESSION DISCUSSION ITEMS
1. Consideration Of Special Event Permit For Franklin Pride Festival Sponsored By Franklin Pride TN At The Park At Harlinsdale Farm On June 4, 2022.
Sponsors: Milissa Reierson, Monique McCullough, Lisa Clayton

2. Consideration Of Liquor License For Bourbon Brothers 2, LLC, D/B/A As Barrels & Brews (John Pratt, Paul Pratt, Wyatt England, Hemel Surati, Vrushank Surati, Vikash Surati, Dharmesh Surati, Divyesh Surati, Pranvi Parekh, Khylam Hari, Shantu Hari, Jason Reeder, John Poling, Christian Poling, McClain H. Franks, Rhonda G. Franks, Tarun Patel, and Pieush Patel), 1306 Highway 96 East, Franklin, TN 37064.
Sponsors: Lanaii Benne

3. Presentation Of The Water And Sewer Impact Fee And A Timeline For Future Discussions.
Sponsors: Michelle Hatcher, Brian Goodwin

4. Consideration Of Ordinance 2022-01, An Ordinance To Amend Appendix A - Comprehensive Fees And Pentalties, Chapter 17 Refuse And Trash Disposal, Of The Frankling Municipal Code To Increase The Fees For Collection Of Garbage And Refuse, To $65.00 A Ton.
Sponsors: Mark Hilty, Jack Tucker

5. Consideration Of Procurement Award To Occupational Health Centers Of The Southwest, P.A., D/B/A Concentra Medical Centers, In The Total Estimated Amount During The Initial One-Year Term Of Award Of $10,340 For Certain Pre-Employment Physical Medical Exam Services For Candidates To Become Uniformed Personnel Of The Franklin Fire Department (Purchasing Office Procurement Solicitation No. 2022-010; Contract No. 2022-0017).
Sponsors: Glenn Johnson

6. Brief Update On New City Hall Next Steps.
WS 2/8/22
Sponsors: Eric Stuckey, Vernon Gerth

7. Discussion Regarding The Capital Improvement Plan.
Sponsors: Eric Stuckey

OTHER BUSINESS

ADJOURN

#CityofFranklin #FranklinTN #TN
